caption: The video begins with a close-up view of a car's dashboard, focusing on the ignition area. A hand is seen turning the key in the ignition, likely starting the vehicle. The dashboard lights illuminate, indicating that the car is powered on. The camera then shifts to show a close-up of the steering wheel, which has the word "CORVETTE" embossed on it, suggesting that this is a Chevrolet Corvette. The interior of the car appears well-used, with some wear visible on the steering wheel and dashboard. The scene captures the moment just before driving, emphasizing the details of the car's interior and the action of starting the engine.
